When the white men came to Victoria, there was one doctor of great celebrity in the Western District, Tuurap Warneen, chief of the Mount Kolor tribe. So celebrated was he for his supernatural powers, and for the cure of diseases, that people of various tribes came from great distances to consult him. He could speak many dialects.
